message:
feat(parser,layout): implement subgraph/cluster parsing and compact disconnected component layout

Parser (fm-parser):
- Implement full subgraph parsing in flowchart mode. The parser now
  recognizes `subgraph <key> [<title>]` and `end` statements, maintaining
  an active cluster stack so that nodes and edges declared inside a
  subgraph block are automatically registered as cluster members.
- Add `parse_subgraph_statement()` to handle subgraph header syntax
  including bracketed labels (`subgraph id [Title]`) and bare identifiers.
- Add `add_node_to_active_clusters()` helper to propagate node membership
  to all currently open subgraph scopes (supporting nested subgraphs).
- Refactor `parse_edge_statement()` into `parse_edge_statement_with_nodes()`
  which returns the interned (from, to) node IDs so callers can register
  those nodes with active clusters. The original function now delegates to
  the new one for backward compatibility.
- Remove `subgraph` and `end` from `is_non_graph_statement()` so they are
  no longer silently skipped.
- `lower_flow_ast()` now accepts an `active_clusters` parameter and
  registers interned nodes with all open subgraph scopes.
- Emit warnings for unmatched `end` keywords and unclosed subgraph blocks.
- Add unit test `flowchart_subgraphs_populate_clusters_with_members`
  verifying cluster membership for a two-subgraph diagram.

Layout (fm-layout):
- Add `weakly_connected_components()` graph utility that computes weakly
  connected components via iterative DFS on the undirected edge set.
- Integrate component compaction into `rank_assignment()`: when multiple
  disconnected components exist, each component's ranks are shifted into
  an independent band (with a gap), preventing pathological ultra-wide
  layouts where many disconnected chains all share rank 0/1.
- Add test `tb_disconnected_components_do_not_collapse_into_horizontal_strip`
  verifying that 20 disconnected 2-node chains produce a stacked layout
  rather than a single wide row.
- Simplify the `lr_nodes_aligned_by_rank` test from 4 nodes (two
  disconnected pairs) to 3 nodes (one root with two targets) to better
  isolate rank alignment behavior under the new compaction logic.
- Various rustfmt formatting cleanups: expanded struct literals, function
  signatures, and import groupings for readability.

CLI (fm-cli):
- Wire up theme support in `render_format()`: parse the `--theme` flag
  into a `ThemePreset`, construct an `SvgRenderConfig`, and call
  `render_svg_with_config()` instead of `render_svg()` for both SVG and
  PNG output paths. Unknown themes fall back to the default with a
  tracing warning.
- Update integration test `handles_subgraphs` to assert on the new
  cluster data: verify cluster count, per-cluster member counts, and
  layout cluster presence.

WASM (fm-wasm):
- Add `TextMetrics` to web-sys features in workspace Cargo.toml for
  canvas-based text measurement in the WASM rendering path.
- Disable wasm-opt in release profile (`wasm-opt = false`) to work around
  binaryen compatibility issues during wasm-pack builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,3 +20,6 @@ serde-wasm-bindgen.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 wasm-bindgen.workspace = true
 web-sys.workspace = true
+
+[package.metadata.wasm-pack.profile.release]
+wasm-opt = false
